---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new applet, flag, or behavior
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary
<!-- One sentence describing what you'd like to see. -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why is this useful? Who benefits? -->

## Proposed behavior
<!-- Describe expected inputs, outputs, exit codes, and edge cases.
     If this corresponds to a Mainsail applet or flag, link to the
     relevant code or test case in the upstream repo. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- What workarounds exist today? Why aren't they sufficient? -->

## Additional context
<!-- POSIX spec links, related GNU/BSD flag behavior, etc. -->
